ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "appid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "english" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game has English language support */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available (e.g., windows, mac, linux) */,
  "required_age" INTEGER /* Recommended age for playing the game */,
  "price" REAL /* The initial price of the game */,
  "discount_price" REAL /* The discounted price of the game */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is free */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* The ESRB rating of the game */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A score representing the game's popularity */,
  "total_playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the game in minutes */,
  "total_owners" INTEGER /* Total number of players who own the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the game's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appid")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_categories" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* The number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* The number of not helpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player recommends the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("appid")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* The number of points awarded for unlocking the achievement */,
  "unlock_conditions" TEXT /* The conditions required to unlock the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("appid")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "unlock_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was unlocked */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the achievement is hidden until unlocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sales" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the game was sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated */,
  "discounted_sales" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sales data includes discounted prices */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* The channel through which the game was sold (e.g., digital, retail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "region", "sales_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date when the player joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date the player logged into the game */,
  "total_playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the player across all games in minutes */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount of money spent by the player on the platform */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is banned */,
  "banned_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the player's ban (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_owners" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "owner_id")
)
